subcodes.first_line: O Shukru'lláh! Thou hast attained unto that which hath been recorded and inscribed in the divine Books. Beseech thou the True One that He may vouchsafe unto thee His confirmations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شکرالله فائز شدی بانچه در کتب الهی مذکور و مسطور از حق بطلب ترا تایید
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions
